evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Long-tail (docs_unavailable). Internally consistent and version-aware ('xendit-python' SDK, VirtualAccountApi). However, mixing xendit.set_api_key with VirtualAccountApi(client) is suspicious; current xendit-python uses xendit.Xendit(api_key=...) pattern. Callback token via x-callback-token header is plausible.
evidence.executability: Fenced blocks parse. However, testing requires ngrok (sandbox-infeasible per harness pattern), which caps executability at 2. Also response.to_dict() may not match SDK object shape.
evidence.completeness: All six pieces present: keys acquisition with URL+menu, install bash, .env template, backend code, frontend code, test procedure. Env var names consistent. Test command is procedural rather than a single runnable command.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Only links to dashboard.xendit.co (operator console), not developers.xendit.co official docs. No official docs URL anchored near code.

rubric_notes: ngrok requirement caps executability at 2. Citation only points to dashboard, not developer docs domain.
